name: Forty Days in the Wilderness
oracleText:
Chapter I - You gain 2 life and scry 2.
Chapter II - Search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.
Chapter III - Creatures you control gain hexproof until your next turn.
flavorText: "When he had fasted forty days and forty nights, he was afterward an hungred." — Matthew 4:2
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; first-pass mechanics were added. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses James Tissot's "Jesus Transported by a Spirit onto a High Mountain" via Wikimedia Commons.

classics.license: Public domain; Brooklyn Museum Commons upload marked with no known restrictions.
classics.creditText: James Tissot, Jesus Transported by a Spirit onto a High Mountain
classics.sourceNotes: This temptation-in-the-wilderness scene gives the card a direct classics fit.
